summary: Iteration 59 - Pricing Tier Security & Contract Tier Data Testing. All 10 backend tests passed. P0 agency ownership check on pricing endpoint working correctly (403 for other agency vehicles). P1 tier data in contracts working - all 4 tier fields present in contract_data and PDF generation.
critical_code_review_comments: Agency ownership check in PUT /api/admin/vehicles/{id}/pricing correctly returns 403 for non-owned vehicles
Contract generation properly extracts selected_tier from reservation and adds tier fields to contract_data
PDF generation includes highlighted blue box for selected tier (lines 258-289 in contracts.py)
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 and P1 features fully working. Agency ownership check on pricing endpoint returns 403 with French error message. Contract tier data includes selected_tier_name, selected_tier_km, selected_tier_price, selected_tier_period. PDF generation includes blue highlighted tier section.

P0_agency_ownership_check.agency_admin_PUT_other_agency_vehicle: PASS - Returns 403 Forbidden with message 'Vous ne pouvez modifier que les vehicules de votre agence'
P0_agency_ownership_check.super_admin_PUT_any_vehicle: PASS - Can update pricing for any vehicle

P1_contract_tier_data.contract_generation_includes_tier: PASS - selected_tier_name, selected_tier_km, selected_tier_price, selected_tier_period all present
P1_contract_tier_data.existing_contract_has_tier_fields: PASS - All 4 tier fields present in contract_data
